name: Dr. Swati Nair
bio: Dr. Swati Nair directs the Wireless Systems Lab where she develops signal processing techniques for massive MIMO and mmWave communications in 5G and beyond. Her group proposed a deep-unfolding architecture for channel estimation that matches the accuracy of iterative algorithms at a fraction of the compute cost, now being evaluated by a telecom equipment partner. She works extensively on non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA) schemes for ultra-reliable low-latency communications in industrial IoT. Her lab maintains a software-defined radio testbed with 16-antenna arrays.
